name: profiles/active.sh records the previous profile so an undo set can revert the change
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro profiles && printf 'active_profile: baseline\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/profile-state.yaml && printf 'rules: {}\n' > profiles/high-risk.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/profiles/active.sh" --set high-risk --state .claude-tdd-pro/profile-state.yaml --profiles-dir profiles 2>err.txt && grep -q 'previous_profile: baseline' .claude-tdd-pro/profile-state.yaml && echo ok 1>&2
